creator: lippemail@gmail.com
text:
Hi Bart,

I think that patch is wrong, you are making an downgrade instead of
upgrade. I see that have an new version in official website, if you want
upgrade this to latest version and re-send an followup to ports/120687.

Well I can close it. Thanks!

-- 
lippe@FreeBSD.org
Felippe de Meirelles Motta
